name: Virgil, the Dark Latex
description:
"Hello, Virgil" - Me every time I get a notification on my phone

Unfortunately this isn't the storm that is approaching. He's a furry.

Basically, you're a researcher who's become obsessed with the dark latex specimens. Your co-workers notice and send you to them to either get transfurred or die. Thanks, Thunder Scientific Co.
creator: Vizu1fox
